description:
Vietnam's giant gamble on one of the world's biggest airports.
🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/why-asia-is-getting-another-mega-airport
For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉  https://bit.ly/the-b1m

00:00 Intro
02:27 Southeast Asia's next mega-port
04:09 Why build Long Thanh Airport?
05:10 Building Long Thanh
08:46 The dust problem
10:04 Cost concerns
11:20 Does Vietnam need this?

Additional footage and images: Vietnam News Agency, Toàn BDS, Heerim Architects, Changi Airport Group, BDN 365, Cambodianess, Universe Travel, ITV News, When Realty Bytes, eclecticom: Travels around the world and more, San Miguel Corporation, Vietnam and More, ADP Ingénierie, Kiến Thức Đại Học, VTV24, Báo Tuổi Trẻ, Tạp chí Diễn đàn doanh nghiệp, Báo Pháp Luật TP HCM, VN Express, Báo Sài Gòn Giải Phóng and JetlinerSpotting SGN.

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m
